name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
target_description: Parents or legal guardians of girl children under 10 years of age (Indian residents)
ministry: Ministry of Finance (under Small Savings Schemes)
data_source: SSY scheme details from official sources and indiapost.gov.in

rules.description: Applicant must have a girl child under 10 years of age
rules.ambiguity_note: Account must be opened before girl child turns 10 years old.

rules.description: Applicant should have income to meet minimum annual deposit of ₹250
rules.ambiguity_note: Minimum deposit ₹250/year required to keep account active.

rules.description: Girl child must be an Indian resident, not an NRI
rules.ambiguity_note: Girl child must be Indian resident. NRI not eligible. Aadhaar possession is used as proxy for Indian residency — NRIs typically do not have Aadhaar.

rules.description: Maximum 2 SSY accounts per family (exception for twins/triplets)
rules.ambiguity_note: Max 2 SSY accounts per family (exception: twins/triplets for 3rd).

benefit_summary: 8.2% p.a. interest (Q3 FY2025-26, quarterly revision). EEE tax status. Partial withdrawal 50% after girl turns 18 for higher education. Account matures 21 years from opening or on marriage after 18.

application_offices.find_instruction: Any scheduled commercial bank (SBI, PNB, Bank of Baroda, etc.)

description: High-interest savings account for a girl child below 10 years, operated by her parents/guardian. Interest rate: 8.2% per annum (highest among small savings schemes). Annual deposit: ₹250 minimum to ₹1.5 lakh maximum. Deposits eligible for tax deduction under Section 80C. Account matures 21 years from opening. Partial withdrawal allowed at age 18 for education.
description_hindi: 10 वर्ष से कम उम्र की बेटी के नाम पर पोस्ट ऑफिस या बैंक में खाता खुलता है। 8.2% सालाना ब्याज — सभी छोटी बचत योजनाओं में सबसे ज़्यादा। हर साल ₹250 से ₹1.5 लाख तक जमा। धारा 80C के तहत टैक्स छूट। खाता 21 साल बाद परिपक्व होता है। 18 साल की उम्र में पढ़ाई के लिए 50% निकाल सकते हैं।
benefit_summary_hindi: 8.2% ब्याज/साल — सबसे ऊँचा, टैक्स छूट, बेटी के भविष्य के लिए
